{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mikael
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Mikael]] is a [[Naraka Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
